project_context.goal: Build a modern, polished AI Resume Builder split-pane interface with React 19, TailwindCSS v4, and Framer Motion.
project_context.theme_system: CSS variables based on `.dark` class toggled on the `<html>` or `<body>` element.

root.classes: h-screen w-full flex flex-col overflow-hidden bg-background text-foreground font-sans
root.notes: Locks viewport height. No body scrolling. Independent pane scrolling.

header.classes: flex-none h-[72px] px-8 border-b border-border/50 bg-card/80 backdrop-blur-md sticky top-0 z-20 flex justify-between items-center
header.contents: Left: Logo + 'Resume Builder' title. Center/Right: Stepper Navigation, Theme Toggle, Template Selector dropdown.

main_grid.notes: Splits the remaining height. Mobile is 1 column, Desktop is 2 columns.

left_pane_form.classes: lg:col-span-5 h-full overflow-y-auto px-6 py-8 md:px-10 bg-card relative custom-scrollbar
left_pane_form.notes: The interactive workspace. Uses `bg-card` for slightly elevated feel above standard background.

right_pane_preview.classes: lg:col-span-7 h-full overflow-y-auto bg-muted/30 p-8 lg:p-12 flex flex-col items-center custom-scrollbar relative
right_pane_preview.notes: The preview area. Distinct background color. Hidden on mobile by default.

dark_mode.CRITICAL_RULE: The document in the right pane MUST remain white with black text regardless of the dark mode toggle. Never apply semantic colors like `text-foreground` or `bg-card` to the inner preview document.

form_cards.container: bg-background border border-border p-6 rounded-[1.5rem] shadow-sm relative group mb-6 transition-all hover:border-primary/30
form_cards.drag_handle: absolute left-4 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-muted-foreground opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 cursor-grab
form_cards.delete_button: absolute top-4 right-4 text-muted-foreground hover:text-destructive hover:bg-destructive/10 p-2 rounded-lg transition-colors opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100

inputs.label: text-sm font-semibold text-foreground/90 flex items-center gap-2
inputs.field: w-full h-11 bg-muted/50 rounded-xl px-4 border border-transparent focus-visible:bg-background focus-visible:border-primary focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-primary/20 transition-all
inputs.textarea: w-full min-h-[120px] bg-muted/50 rounded-xl p-4 border border-transparent focus-visible:bg-background focus-visible:border-primary focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-primary/20 transition-all resize-y

magic_ai_button.classes: absolute -top-3 -right-3 bg-gradient-to-r from-violet-500 to-fuchsia-500 text-white shadow-lg shadow-violet-500/25 rounded-full px-4 py-1.5 text-xs font-bold flex items-center gap-1.5 hover:scale-105 transition-transform cursor-pointer

stepper_nav.step_active: flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-full border-2 border-primary bg-background text-primary shadow-[0_0_0_4px_hsl(var(--primary)/0.1)]
stepper_nav.step_completed: flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-full border-2 border-primary bg-primary text-primary-foreground
stepper_nav.step_pending: flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-full border-2 border-border bg-background text-muted-foreground
stepper_nav.connector_line: h-0.5 w-8 bg-border (fill with bg-primary via framer-motion width scale when completed)

mobile_preview_toggle.classes: fixed bottom-6 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 bg-background/95 backdrop-blur-md shadow-xl border border-border p-1.5 rounded-full flex gap-1 z-50 lg:hidden
mobile_preview_toggle.tab_active: px-6 py-2 rounded-full text-sm font-semibold bg-primary text-primary-foreground transition-all
mobile_preview_toggle.tab_inactive: px-6 py-2 rounded-full text-sm font-semibold text-muted-foreground hover:bg-muted transition-all
